generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we can protect our critical infrastructure and ensure that our nation's future isn't held hostage by geopolitical tensions. It's time to prioritize our sovereignty and security over short-term economic gains. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
